title: Picture In Picture
description: A minecraft mod to create picture in picture windows
body:
[![Version][version-shield]][version-url] [![Issues][issues-shield]][issues-url] [![CC BY-NC 4.0 License][license-shield]][license-url] [![Contributors][contributors-shield]][contributors-url] [![Stargazers][stars-shield]][stars-url] [![Forks][forks-shield]][forks-url]

Picture In Picture

A minecraft mod to create picture in picture windows

Table of Contents
  1. About Picture In Picture
  2. Support
  3. Roadmap
  4. Contributing
  5. License
## About Picture In Picture ![Overlay picture in picture][product-screenshot] Waiting for storage to fill up, but want to do something else, just create a new window zoom in and overlay it on top of anything. Windows can be:
Zoomed zoom in to specific things to keep an eye on
Floated keep the window above all other programs
Dragged drag a window with your mouse around the screen
Resized make the window smaller while, optionally keeping the minecraft window aspect ratio

(back to top)

![Overlay picture in picture][product-screenshot-2] ### Supports [![Mod Menu][Mod Menu]][mod-menu-url] ## Roadmap - [x] Add mod menu support - [ ] Add hide addon - [ ] Refactor code for multiloader - [ ] Add multiloader support - [ ] forge - [ ] fabric See the [open issues](https://github.com/DJ1TJOO/mod-picture-in-picture/issues) for a full list of proposed features (and known issues).

(back to top)

## Contributing Contributions are what make the open source community such an amazing place to learn, inspire, and create. My open gl experience is limited, any contributions you make are **greatly appreciated**. If you have a suggestion that would make this better, please fork the repo and create a pull request. You can also simply open an issue with the tag "enhancement". Don't forget to give the project a star! Thanks again! 1. Fork the Project 2. Create your Feature Branch (`git checkout -b feat/AmazingFeature`) 3. Commit your Changes (`git commit -m 'Add some AmazingFeature'`) 4. Push to the Branch (`git push origin feat/AmazingFeature`) 5. Open a Pull Request

(back to top)
